usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural test only — no AI was used. All six phases passed: single-day summary+date round-trip, multi-day round-trip (3 days with distinct summaries/dates/item counts), summary-only and date-only partial metadata, empty-days truncation to zero items, and full replacement semantics (3-day overwritten by 2-day with no stale data). PR #198 day_summary and day_date metadata persistence is working correctly.
